name: more-export-for-gemini
description: Adds Markdown, TXT, HTML, JSON, DOCX, PDF, EPUB, LaTeX and many more export options to Gemini Deep Research.

scripts.test: node test/edge-cases.mjs && node test/validate.mjs && node test/extractor.mjs && node test/menu-injector.mjs && node test/background.mjs && node test/content.mjs && node test/history.mjs && node test/options.mjs && node test/i18n.mjs
scripts.lint: eslint src/lib src/exporters src/popup src/options src/content.js src/background.js test scripts
